name: Zbom Home Collection Co.,Ltd
summary: Zbom Home Collection Co.,Ltd manufactures and distributes kitchen and bathroom cabinets in China and internationally. It also offers closets and hardware products. The company was formerly known as Zbom Cabinets Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Zbom Home Collection Co.,Ltd in August 2018. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Hefei, China.
